name: mend_blz
description: End-to-end Mend remediation recipe for Blazemeter — composes the mend, dep-remediation, jenkins, github, and jira skills into one loop: alerts → fix on a dated branch → Jenkins green → PR → Jira (MOB). Holds the fix-loop order/gates; the reusable knowledge lives in the composed skills and the component registry lives in the orchestrator (config/mend/services.json).
